CHR_DRIVE_CONTROL.name: Drive control
CHR_DRIVE_CONTROL.description: 16-byte AES-ECB ciphertext; plaintext layout from SuperCarsSupport.craft_packet (movement, direction, light, speed).

CHR_BATTERY_NOTIFY.name: Battery notify
CHR_BATTERY_NOTIFY.description: Encrypted 16-byte notify; Gadgetbridge reads plaintext byte index 4 as battery level.
